Rarity: Unique
Nightscale
Pauascale Gloves
--------

--------
Requires: Level 45, 56 Int
--------
Item Level: 80
--------
{ Unique Modifier — Energy Shield }
60(60-100)% increased Energy Shield
{ Unique Modifier — Attribute }
+14(10-20) to Intelligence
{ Unique Modifier — Elemental, Cold, Resistance }
+23(20-30)% to Cold Resistance
{ Unique Modifier — Mana }
Cannot Regenerate Mana if you haven't dealt a Critical Hit Recently — Unscalable Value
{ Unique Modifier — Mana, Critical }
150% increased Mana Regeneration Rate if you've dealt a Critical Hit Recently
{ Unique Modifier — Critical }
41(30-50)% increased Critical Hit Chance
--------
Diamora sings not for hunger, but for longing.
